compliance_note: ships only when the EOI phase is active; re-clear against live conditions. Non-binding expression of interest only. No payment, no commitment, no allocation, no priority, no minimum. Verbatim CSF warning retained. Re-run the full compliance battery against live offer conditions before this phase goes live.
angle: Recursion / community (EOI: you built this, tell us if our raise interests you)
hook_type: Personal address + cadence numbers + recursion (interest-only frame)
tactic: 'You did this' proof -> the platform is raising -> non-binding interest ask
primary_text:
137,000 of you backed 324 companies on our platform. Now we want to know if our own raise interests you.

Every one of those raises, $234M+ in total, came from people choosing to own a piece of something they believed in, not from VCs. You built that.

Telling us is a non-binding expression of interest. No payment, no commitment, and you decide nothing until you read the offer document.

Indicate your interest. You will see the offer the moment it goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: 137,000 of you built this. Are you in?
description: Non-binding. No payment, no commitment. Indicate your interest.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- E2 Recursion / Community (EOI, existing investors, phase-gated)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W3 recursion angle, re-framed for the EOI phase regime.
_v5_rationale: Client's EOI examples used 'secure your spot in the Birchal raise' / 'priority'. This rewrites recursion to interest-only with both referents explicit (you = the investor; we/the platform = the company raising).
Hook Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode (personal address + 137,000 + 324 cadence + recursion). EOI regime does not force a softer hook here.
'choosing to own a piece' retains the load-bearing ownership phrase (FMTH evidence). No allocation/priority/minimum/preferential language.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, most-aware. Existing Birchal investors, EOI phase.
_a_pile_signals: recursion (now we want to know if our own raise interests you)
_compliance_findings_resolved: EOI regime: 'non-binding expression of interest', 'no payment, no commitment', 'indicate your interest'. Allowed EOI language only.

STILL HARD-BLOCK clear: no 'first in line', no priority access/allocation, no 'secure/reserve your allocation/place/spot in the raise', no 'shares allocated to early registrants', no minimum, no 'same terms as institutional/insiders', no 'be first in the queue'. Zero matches.
BANNED-CSF-PHRASES (waitlist set): zero matches. No 'invest/buy/subscribe now'.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'you will see the offer the moment it goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
Anti-preferential terms (s 738G): no preferential framing vs the public offer; EOI is free, non-binding, equal-access.
Subject discipline: 'Birchal' appears zero times in body; 'our platform' / first-person we/our; recursion referents explicit.
